intent: Replay cross-adapter sovereignty regression evidence across AAOS systems completed through M8.

replay_steps.expected_observation: All required AAOS systems are present in the regression evidence.

replay_steps.action: Evaluate forbidden authority claims across external tools, specimens, workspaces, and evaluators.
replay_steps.expected_observation: No external system claims AAOS-retained authority.

replay_steps.action: Confirm high-risk regression replay remains eligible for advisor review.
replay_steps.expected_observation: Advisor invocation is a governance review hook and not final authority.

replay_result.expected_result: Cross-adapter sovereignty regression is replay-ready and remains evidence-only.
replay_result.actual_result: Cross-adapter sovereignty regression is replay-ready and remains evidence-only.

not_authority_statement: Cross-adapter runtime replay may detect missing evidence or authority-boundary violations but must not approve, block, classify, roll back, seal Decision Proof, close audits, or make final governance judgments.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS retains purpose and business intent, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, final risk classification, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, and final governance authority.
